summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PropGram property social media platform. All new features working correctly including Places People Stayed feed, Profile tabs (Posts/Wishlist/Places), Request Viewing functionality, and messaging system. Backend APIs responding correctly.
passed_tests: Wishlist API (/api/wishlist) returns 200 for authenticated users
Profile page loads with 3 tabs: Posts, Wishlist, Places
Places People Stayed feed page loads with sample reviews (3 place cards found)
Request Viewing button visible and clickable on property cards
Request Viewing modal opens with property details and contact options
Profile page accessible via bottom navigation
Messages page accessible with proper empty state
Like functionality working on places feed
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
